description: CompositionWhite high collar jacket made of 100% polyester, with a broad tie-up hood, zipperd front placket, adidas patent 3-Stripes running down the full sleeves, welt pockets on the sides, black synthetic panel across the midriff, welt pocket on the right chest and adidas logo on the left chestFittingRegularWash careonly hand wash gentlyDo not machine washWash with like coloursWash and iron inside outDo not use fabric softenerUse mild detergent onlyDo not iron on motif/print/trims/logoA combination of carefully selected fabrics, this jacket keeps your body dry by drawing sweat away from your body helping you to perform at your peak in even the most heated competition. Wear it with a crew or round neck tee and denims with sneakers for that fantabulously casual style.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
